goal: Describe the exact output needed in one sentence.
target_use: background | transition | quote-card | map-sequence | title-treatment | research-summary | other

visual_requirements.color_notes: aged gold, deep red, dark parchment, restrained green accents
visual_requirements.composition_notes: slow, legible, centered hierarchy, strong margins

output_spec.file_format: png | jpg | svg | mp4 | txt | md | json

review_checks: Supports at least one recurring motif
Readable in under two seconds if text-based
Reusable beyond one single shot if possible
No obvious historical or stylistic contradiction
destination_after_approval: Specify the exact folder where approved outputs should go.
run_notes: Paste prompt variations, tool name, and decisions here after the run.
